_metadata._verification_scope: Top 100 publishers verified via web research

shut_down.name: Gigajob
shut_down.reason: Company deadpooled/shut down. Domain transferred to JS Media, Inc.

shut_down.name: InfoJobs Italy (infojobs.it)
shut_down.reason: Adevinta closed Italian operations Oct 2025. Spain branch continues.

shut_down.name: Monster Europe
shut_down.reason: Shut down after CareerBuilder+Monster bankruptcy. DNS killed.

acquisitions_mergers.details: Chapter 11 bankruptcy. Bold acquired job board assets for $28M. Brands continue under Bold.
Operations merging into Indeed. 1,300 layoffs. CEO stepped down Oct 2025. Full integration by Mar 31, 2026.
Combined platform reaches 100M+ hourly workers. Operates as standalone within JobGet.
Full 100% acquisition. New CEO Maximilian Preisser. Repositioned as job board.
Still operational with reduced team under The Muse.
Italian staffing company. 48 employees. Continues operating.
Now part of Veritone HR Solutions alongside Broadbean.

ownership_changes.new_owner: KKR + CPP Investments (majority), Axel Springer (10% minority)
ownership_changes.details: Spun off into independent joint venture.
LIFULL spun off overseas division. Aggregator model declining.
Part of ~EUR 2B deal for Adevinta Spanish operations.

rebrands.details: Rebranded under Veritone HR Solutions umbrella.

Indeed.notes: Launching Indeed Connect premium tier Jan 2026. 1,300 layoffs Jul 2025. Merging Glassdoor operations. ARPJ new KPI. Shift to AI and monetization.

LinkedIn.notes: AI-powered Job Search, Career Coach, Predictive Career Path. Multilingual AI expansion. OpenAI building competing platform mid-2026.

ZipRecruiter.notes: FY2025 revenue $449M (-5% YoY). Net loss $33M. Stock $1.81. CFO departing. 800+ employees.

Glassdoor.notes: Operations merging into Indeed by Mar 31, 2026. CEO stepped down Oct 2025. Job posting now through Indeed.

Monster.notes: Chapter 11 bankruptcy Jun 2025. Bold acquired for $28M Jul 2025. Monster Europe shut down. US brand continues.

CareerBuilder.notes: Chapter 11 bankruptcy Jun 2025. Bold acquired for $28M Jul 2025. Brand continues under Bold.

Talent.com.notes: Formerly Neuvoo (rebranded 2019). 78+ countries. 28M+ monthly visitors. Series B $120M (2022).

Jora.notes: Part of SEEK family. 356,400+ jobs. Primarily Australia/NZ. Active mobile apps.

Trovit.owner: FazWaz team (spun off from LIFULL Jan 2025)
Trovit.notes: LIFULL spun off overseas division Jan 2025. Aggregator model declining. Now controlled by FazWaz team.

Adzuna.notes: 20 countries. Acquired Getwork (US) 2022. Launched ApplyIQ AI agent Apr 2025. UK govt contract.

Jobtome.notes: Swiss-based aggregator. 48 employees. 10M+ users. Part of Gi Group ecosystem.

Careerjet.notes: 130+ countries, 30+ languages. API active. Privately held.

Jooble.notes: 69 countries. 90M monthly users. Top-10 Jobs & Employment traffic globally.

SimplyHired.notes: Repositioned as secondary traffic source within Recruit ecosystem. Poor user reviews.

JobRapido.notes: 58 countries. 55M monthly visits. 100M+ users. Launched Jobespresso Dec 2025. 140 employees.

Snagajob.notes: Acquired Nov 2024. Combined 100M+ hourly workers. Standalone within JobGet. JobGet also acquired Seasoned Mar 2025.

Dice.notes: 33% workforce cut 2025. Revenue declining 15% YoY. Separated from ClearanceJobs. Contract talent expansion.

Handshake.notes: $300M ARR end 2025. Acquired Cleanlab Jan 2026. 1,600+ universities. Expanding Europe.

Reed.notes: UK #1 job site. 200K+ jobs. 8.8M monthly visits. Founder Sir Alec Reed passed away Dec 2025.

Totaljobs.notes: Part of StepStone. Spun off from Axel Springer Apr 2025. KKR/CPP Investments majority, Axel Springer 10%.

StepStone.notes: Spun off from Axel Springer Apr 2025. Independent JV. Owns Totaljobs, Appcast. Expanded.

Xing.notes: New Work SE fully acquired by Burda Jun 2025. New CEO Maximilian Preisser. 21M DACH users. Job board focus.

SEEK.notes: Unified SEEK/Jobsdb/Jobstreet Feb 2024. Sold LATAM businesses. AUD 2B revenue target FY2028.

JobStreet.notes: Unified into SEEK platform Feb 2024. 8 APAC markets. 40M+ talent pool. AI-powered matching.

Naukri.notes: Q2 FY26 revenue up 14.9% YoY. IT hiring slump but AI/ML roles growing +41%. 200M+ users.

Bayt.notes: Leading MENA job board. 44M+ professionals. 40K+ organizations. 11 locations.

Appcast.notes: Launched Appcast Search Ads May 2025. UK expansion Jan 2025. 2,000+ customers. Part of StepStone/KKR.

PandoLogic.notes: Rebranded to Veritone Hire alongside Broadbean. Part of Veritone HR Solutions. pandoIQ platform.

HelloWork.notes: Formerly RegionsJob (rebranded 2022). France #1 employment platform. 5.7M visits/month. EUR 109M orders 2023.

Welcome to the Jungle.notes: Acquired Otta (UK) 2024. Expanding US 2025. 5.3M visitors. 12K+ tech companies. 4-day workweek.

Computrabajo.notes: Leading LATAM job board. 19 countries. 366M monthly visitors. New distribution strategy Feb 2026.

51Job.owner: DCP Capital / Ocean Link / CEO consortium
51Job.notes: Privatized from Nasdaq 2022. Planning HK IPO (delayed from H1 2025). 200M+ users. AI partnership Alibaba Cloud.

PostJobFree.notes: Free job posting since 2007. 3.4M+ jobs posted weekly. Paid plans from $29/month.

Fairygodboss.notes: Largest career community for women. Acquired by The Muse 2022. Reduced team.

Gigajob.owner: N/A (domain transferred to JS Media Inc.)
Gigajob.notes: Deadpooled. Formerly operated in 146 countries, 38 languages. Based in Erlangen, Germany.

InfoJobs.notes: Italy branch shut down Oct 2025. Spain market leader (11M candidates). Being sold to EQT Q1 2026. New CEO Jan 2025.

Lensa.notes: 20M+ users. AI-powered matching. Mixed user reviews. Free for job seekers.

Jobcase.notes: Acquired Upward.net (2021) and Recruitology. 110M+ members. AI Career Coach.

Nexxt.notes: Formerly Beyond.com (rebranded 2017). $13.8M revenue. 150M+ candidates. Possible 2026 layoffs.

CV Library.notes: 20.7M CVs. 4.3M monthly users. Acquired Brilliant Jobs 2022. Resume-Library is US sister brand.

Joblift.notes: 5M users/month. Blue/grey collar focus. 100+ employees Berlin & Hamburg.

Experteer.notes: Executive job board. 80K+ jobs. Poor user reviews re: billing/subscriptions.
